data.title: MovaChain Secures Strategic Funding to Enhance Blockchain Infrastructure
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, MovaChain, a modular blockchain platform designed for global payment scenarios, has announced the completion of strategic financing, reaching a post-investment valuation of $100 million. The funding round was co-led by the Aqua1 Foundation and UAE's GeoNova Capital, with participation from other top financial institutions in Abu Dhabi.

Aqua1 Foundation is a leading UAE Web3 investment fund focused on blockchain infrastructure, financial protocols, and tokenization of real-world assets. It gained attention for investing $100 million in World Liberty Financial, a crypto platform supported by the Trump family. GeoNova Capital, on the other hand, is a fund established through investments from Standard Chartered Bank, various UAE institutions, and family offices. It focuses on high-growth sectors and collaborates extensively with sovereign funds, family offices, and private capital to create long-term value through deep engagement.

The recent funding will support MovaChain in advancing three strategic priorities: building modular, high-performance infrastructure to meet global institutional application needs; expanding global payment networks and stablecoin settlement solutions to facilitate multi-dimensional payment channels; and accelerating ecosystem development through global collaboration with governments, financial institutions, enterprises, and developers.

Stephen Wong, co-founder of Mova, stated, "Gaining recognition from the UAE's most strategically visionary investment institutions is a strong endorsement of our efforts to build scalable, institutional-grade blockchain infrastructure for global payment scenarios." MovaChain is redefining Web3 infrastructure with its modular architecture, high performance, and global payment capabilities, aiming to establish a reliable foundation for the next-generation digital economy.

data.title: Whale's Ethereum Position Shows Significant Profit
data.description: According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst Ai Yi has reported that a whale's leveraged long position on Ethereum has resulted in substantial profits. The whale, who initially invested $125,000 in a 15x leveraged long position, has seen a floating profit of $4.78 million. Currently, the position is in a rolling state, holding 25,108.32 ETH, valued at approximately $120 million. The entry price for this position was $4,590, with a liquidation price set at $4,670.3.

data.title: LayerZero's Acquisition of Stargate Approved by DAO
data.description:
According to PANews, LayerZero announced that Stargate DAO has approved its acquisition of Stargate (STG). The decision was overwhelmingly supported, with 95% of StargateDAO members voting in favor of the acquisition. STG token holders will have the opportunity to convert their tokens to ZRO starting Monday.

Previously, the LayerZero Foundation proposed a $110 million acquisition of the Stargate cross-chain bridge and its STG tokens.

data.title: NFT Market Experiences Significant Decline in Weekly Trading Volume
data.description:
According to PANews, the NFT market witnessed a notable decrease in trading volume this week, dropping by 25.78% to $134 million, as reported by Crypto.news based on CryptoSlam data. Despite the decline in trading volume, the number of NFT buyers increased by 25.74% to 450,096, while sellers grew by 25.91% to 321,107. The total number of NFT transactions rose by 6.26%, reaching 1,652,284.

The Ethereum network saw a trading volume of $60.7 million, marking a 41.63% decrease from the previous week. In contrast, the BNB Chain network experienced a 10.63% increase, reaching $20.6 million. Polygon network's trading volume rose by 37.86% to $16.1 million, while Mythos Chain saw a modest increase of 3.17%, totaling $9.7 million. Solana network's trading volume fell by 13.63%, amounting to $7.5 million.

Among the high-value sales this week were several CryptoPunks NFTs: CryptoPunks #1082 sold for 80 ETH ($350,969), CryptoPunks #2596 for 72.99 ETH ($315,628), CryptoPunks #5477 for 66 ETH ($285,187), CryptoPunks #3704 for 63 ETH ($271,922), and CryptoPunks #8864 for 56.5 ETH ($269,994).

data.title: Musk Announces Grok 2.5 Model Open Source Release
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Elon Musk announced that xAI's Grok 2.5 model, which was released last year, is now open source. Musk stated that Grok 3 is expected to be open-sourced in approximately six months. He expressed confidence that xAI will soon surpass all companies except Google and eventually significantly outperform Google.

data.title: User Loses $1.54 Million in EIP-7702 Phishing Scam
data.description: According to PANews, a user has reportedly lost approximately $1.54 million due to a phishing scam involving EIP-7702 batch transactions. The victim signed transactions that included multiple token transfers and NFT approval operations, leading to the substantial financial loss.

data.title: Bitcoin's On-Chain Liquidity Shows Signs of Recovery
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitcoin Vector analysis indicates that Bitcoin's on-chain liquidity is strengthening. Historically, each liquidity recovery has preceded a sustained upward trend in BTC prices. Swissblock has shifted its strategy towards aggressive allocation, noting that the current liquidity recovery mirrors past bull market patterns.

data.title: Fosun Wealth Holdings Joins DBS Bank in Distributing Tokenized Notes
data.description: According to Foresight News, Fosun Wealth Holdings has been named as one of the distributors for DBS Bank's tokenized structured notes. These financial products are linked to cryptocurrencies, offering cash payouts when digital asset prices rise while limiting downside risks.

data.title: Trader Faces Significant Losses on Leveraged WLFI Short Position
data.description: According to PANews, a trader with the address starting with 0xbfaa has opened a leveraged short position of 5.3 million WLFI, valued at $1.53 million. This position, which utilizes a threefold leverage, is currently experiencing an unrealized loss of $412,000.
